subcodes.first_line: O Fariburz-i-Parsi! According to what is evident, thou art engaged in teaching the children of the blessed martyr [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فریبرز پارسی از قرار معلوم شما بتعلیم صبایای حضرت شهید مشغولید این زحمت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
